AGENCY OUTREACH EMAIL SCRIPT #1 — introducing your firm to an agency Small Business Specialist (template)

"Jean, I understand that you are the Small Business Specialist with CED Providence.

Our firm XYZ LLC is a Chicago, IL based Certified General Contractor working throughout the Northeast in the private sector for the last 10 years. Recently we have been awarded SBA 8(a) certification.

We have $15 million in bonding, administrators, project managers, superintendents and field staff on payroll.

I am very interested in setting up a meeting to discuss how we can do business with your agency.

For information purposes I have attached our company's capabilities statement.

Thank you for your time today.

DUNS: xxxxxxxxx  CAGE Code xxxxx"

Teaching point: a good first-touch email to a Small Business Specialist is short — name the recipient's role, state who you are (location, license, years, certifications like 8(a)), prove substance fast (bonding capacity, on-staff PMs/supers), ask for a meeting, and attach the capability statement.
